ingest.title: Ingestion & Routing
ingest.subtitle: PDF form probe auto-routes documents to Knowhere text parsing or PixelRAG visual indexing

upload.title: Upload & Routing Strategy
upload.dropTitle: Drag to batch upload · or click to browse
upload.dropHint: Supports PDF · Word · Excel/CSV · Images · URL · up to 50MB per file

url.title: Submit URL
url.placeholder: Paste a public URL (https://...) — web page, PDF, image
url.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

error.invalid_url_format: Invalid URL format. Only http:// and https:// URLs are accepted.
error.url_target_forbidden: This URL points to a private or restricted address and cannot be fetched by the server.
error.url_unreachable: The server cannot reach this URL. Check if the link is public and accessible.
error.url_timeout: The URL took too long to respond. Try again later or use a different link.
error.url_bad_status: The URL returned an error status.
error.fallback: URL submission failed. Please verify the link and try again.

knowhere.title: Force Knowhere (text/tables)
knowhere.desc: Text / HTML table parsing · into eagle_text

pixelrag.title: Force PixelRAG (web/scans/images)
pixelrag.desc: Render & slice · Qwen-VL visual embedding · into eagle_visual

toolbar.search: Search document name, task ID or extension…

table.emptyHint: Upload a file or submit a URL to start ingesting

toast.created: Created {count} ingest tasks, dispatching to Celery queue.
toast.createdHint: Queue position {range} · GPU rendering starts within ~2 min
